title: GitHub - osmanahmadxai/SYNCLE: A system for synchronizing multiple databases in real-time to ensure consistent data across distributed services.
excerpt: A system for synchronizing multiple databases in real-time to ensure consistent data across distributed services. - osmanahmadxai/SYNCLE
content_html:
Keep any databases in sync — live, across engines.

Connect your databases, draw a bridge from a source to one or more destinations, and Syncle keeps them in sync: the moment a row changes in the source, it's written to every destination you linked. Any engine to any engine — PostgreSQL · MySQL/MariaDB · SQLite · MongoDB · Redis — plus HTTP endpoints when you need them.

A bridge is just: a source → one or more destinations → kept in sync.

What it does

A bridge reads rows from a source database and writes each one to its destinations. A destination is either:

  • another database — the headline feature. Sync Postgres → MongoDB, MySQL → SQLite, MongoDB → Redis… mix engines freely. One bridge can fan out to several databases at once, and bridges can chain (DB A → DB B → DB C).
  • an HTTP endpoint — POST/PUT/PATCH each row to a URL with a payload you design, for the times you're feeding a service instead of a database.

What makes the database-to-database sync trustworthy:

  • Any engine → any engine. The same bridge moves a row between relational, document, and key-value stores. Values are translated to fit the target.
  • No duplicates, ever. Writes are idempotent upserts keyed by the columns you choose, so replays, retries, and redeliveries never double-write. Inserts, updates, and deletes all propagate.
  • Missing table? Auto-create it. If the destination table/collection doesn't exist, Syncle creates it from the source's shape (with cross-engine type translation). Or map and rename columns yourself — "write this column into that column over there."
  • Live, polled, or one-shot — you pick how it fires (see triggers below).

How a bridge fires

  • Replay — a one-shot job. Stream all (or selected) rows once, then finish. Perfect for the initial backfill or a migration.
  • Watch — poll the source on a cursor (an auto-increment id, an updated_at column, or a primary-key diff) and sync new rows as they show up. Works on every engine.
  • CDC — true change-data-capture straight from the database's change log, in real time, no polling. Postgres logical replication, MySQL binlog, MongoDB change streams, Redis keyspace notifications. Inserts, updates, and deletes all come through, each tagged with its operation.

The rest is the same whichever destination and trigger you pick:

  • Build it visually. Browse the source table, toggle the columns to send, pick destinations, and watch a live preview of exactly what will be written.
  • Map or shape the data. For a database target, map source → target columns (rename, drop, pick keys). For an HTTP target, use a safe token template — {{column}}, {{$row}}, {{$table}}, {{$op}}, {{$now}}, {{$index}}. Structured substitution only — no string injection, no code execution.
  • Sync reliably. Retries with backoff, rate limiting, optional batching, and exactly-once delivery so a change is applied once and only once downstream.
  • Watch it happen. A live timeline colours every delivery green (synced) · red (failed) · amber (skipped) · slate (queued). Click any cell for the exact row written, the result, timing, and any error.
  • Stay in control. Runs survive restarts, resume where they stopped, and can be cancelled. Skip rows by range or selection, or retry only the failed ones in place — failed cells flip green.

Get started

You'll need Node 22+, pnpm 10+, and Docker. The repo pins both via .nvmrc and packageManager, so the easiest setup is:

nvm use            # picks up Node 22 from .nvmrc (or just use Node 22+ yourself)
corepack enable    # gives you the exact pnpm version the repo expects

Then:

pnpm install                  # frontend + backend
docker compose up -d          # postgres (metadata) + redis (job queue)
pnpm start                    # initialize and run the whole app

pnpm start does the boring parts for you: it writes the local env files, builds the workspace, runs the database migrations, then launches both the API and the web app.

  Syncle · ready

    Web  http://localhost:3002   ← open this
    API  http://localhost:4002/api

Working on the code? pnpm dev is the same thing in watch mode.

Install trouble? better-sqlite3 is the only dependency that needs a native binary. On Node 22+ it installs a prebuilt one — no compiler needed. If you see it fall back to node-gyp (or a tsc: command not found right after, which just means the install bailed early), you're usually on a Node version without a prebuild or a distro-packaged pnpm with a broken node-gyp. Fix: use Node 22+ (nvm use), get pnpm via corepack enable instead of your system package manager, then pnpm install again.

The two services back different things. Postgres holds Syncle's own metadata (saved connections, hooks, runs, deliveries) through Prisma. Redis backs the BullMQ queue that runs hooks durably. Connecting databases, browsing data, and building/previewing hooks all work without Redis — only running a hook needs it. Point DATABASE_URL / REDIS_URL at your own instances if you'd rather not use the bundled containers.

The bridge lifecycle

  1. Connect your databases (credentials encrypted at rest) from the Data sources workbench, or inline while building a bridge.
  2. Create a bridge — pick the source table and columns, then choose where it syncs: one or more target databases (map columns or let it auto-create the table) and/or an HTTP endpoint. Pick a trigger (replay / watch / CDC). For CDC the builder runs a readiness check and tells you exactly what (if anything) the source still needs configured.
  3. Run / listen — a replay job streams rows once with the timeline updating live; a watch or CDC bridge starts listening and syncs changes as they happen.
  4. React — skip rows you don't want, cancel, resume the remainder, or retry the failures after fixing a destination. Edits apply on the next run/resume.

Source data, when you need it

Syncle ships a full database workbench (the "Data sources" surface) — handy for shaping a source and for inspecting what landed in a destination:

  • Browse any table — paginated, sortable, multi-condition filters, inline edit, insert/delete, CSV/JSON export.
  • A Monaco query editor with tabs, autocomplete, and formatting.
  • Schema explorer, structure view, interactive ER diagram, and full DDL (create/drop/truncate tables, create/drop databases).
  • Backup & restore — portable JSON for any engine, or .sql for relational ones.

Every table view has a one-click "Create bridge" that drops you into the builder pre-seeded with that table as the source.

How it's built

A pnpm monorepo with a one-way dependency flow (web → api → core):

syncle/
├─ packages/
│  └─ core/            @syncle/core — framework-agnostic domain (pure TS)
│     ├─ adapters/       DatabaseAdapter interface + one file per engine
│     │                  (raw drivers: pg, mysql2, better-sqlite3, mongodb, ioredis)
│     └─ hooks/          column mapping + cross-engine table translation,
│                        payload transform, shared bridge schemas (Zod)
├─ apps/
│  ├─ api/             @syncle/api — NestJS backend
│  │  ├─ hooks/          bridge store · run processor · CDC providers ·
│  │  │                  sink router → database sink + HTTP delivery
│  │  ├─ connections/    Prisma-backed store · live adapter pool · controllers
│  │  ├─ common/         crypto · Zod validation · exception filter
│  │  └─ prisma/         metadata-store schema + migrations
│  └─ web/             @syncle/web — Next.js 15 frontend (shadcn/ui, TanStack)
└─ docker-compose.yml  Postgres (metadata) + Redis (run queue)

One sink, two destination kinds. Every trigger (replay, watch, CDC) funnels rows through a single sink router. It dispatches to the database sink (which maps columns, auto-creates the target if needed, and performs a native upsert or keyed delete on the target engine) or to HTTP delivery (template render + POST with retries). The runner, monitor, and exactly-once accounting don't care which — so a new destination is one module.

Exactly-once, cross-engine. Database targets write with the engine's own atomic upsert — Postgres/SQLite ON CONFLICT, MySQL ON DUPLICATE KEY, Mongo updateOne(upsert) — keyed by the columns you chose. That makes every write idempotent: replays and at-least-once CDC redeliveries land a row once. Deletes route to a keyed delete on each target.

Durable runs. A replay run is one BullMQ job (jobId = runId). It streams the source a page at a time (keyset pagination for millions of rows), syncs sequentially (natural backpressure), and checkpoints progress — so a crash auto-resumes from where it left off.

CDC behind one interface. Each engine captures changes its own way, but they all implement the same small CdcProvider contract (readiness, provision, stream, cursor). The service around them handles the run lifecycle and the shared dedupe → map → write → record → checkpoint pipeline, so adding a new engine's CDC is a single file.

Two data layers, two right tools. The databases you connect to have unknown, runtime-discovered schemas, so the adapters use raw drivers with fully parameterized queries (an ORM can't introspect arbitrary schemas). Syncle's own store has a fixed schema we control, so it uses Prisma with migrations.

Adding an engine = implement DatabaseAdapter and register it. The connection form, schema browser, and feature gating all derive from that one registration.

Configuration

Env files are created automatically on first run from the committed *.env.example files. The essentials:

Variable Where Purpose
PORT api API port (default 4002)
WEB_PORT web Web port (default 3002)
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL web Base URL of the API
DATABASE_URL api Postgres datasource for the metadata store
REDIS_URL api Redis backing the bridge-run queue
SYNCLE_MASTER_KEY api base64 32-byte key for secret encryption
SYNCLE_HOOK_CONCURRENCY api How many bridge runs may execute in parallel
WEB_ORIGIN api CORS origin (defaults to any in dev)

If SYNCLE_MASTER_KEY is unset, a random key is generated under apps/api/.syncle/ on first run — set it explicitly in production.

CDC prerequisites

Replay and watch bridges work anywhere. CDC needs the source database configured for change capture; the builder's readiness panel checks all of this for you and spells out what's missing.

Engine Mechanism What it needs
PostgreSQL logical replication wal_level=logical, a role with REPLICATION (slot/publication auto-made)
MySQL binary log log_bin=ON, binlog_format=ROW, binlog_row_image=FULL, REPLICATION grants
MongoDB change streams a replica set (a single-node one is fine for dev); pre-images auto-enabled so deletes propagate by your key
Redis keyspace notifications notify-keyspace-events (Syncle enables it when it can)
SQLite — not supported; use a watch hook instead

Redis CDC is real-time only and non-durable — events that happen while Syncle is offline can't be recovered, so prefer a watch hook there if you need guarantees.

Scripts

Command Description
pnpm install Install all workspaces
pnpm start Initialize + run everything (production)
pnpm dev Same, with watch-mode for development
pnpm dev:api / pnpm dev:web Run one side only
pnpm build Production build: core → api → web
pnpm db:studio Open Prisma Studio on the metadata store
pnpm typecheck · test · lint · format Quality across all workspaces
pnpm clean / clean:all Remove build artifacts (and node_modules)

Tech stack

NestJS · BullMQ + Redis · Prisma + PostgreSQL · Next.js 15 · React 19 · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · shadcn/ui · TanStack Query & Table · Monaco · React Flow · Zod · Vitest.

Security

  • Connection passwords and hook auth secrets are encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM) and only ever returned to the browser redacted.
  • All user values are passed as bound parameters; identifiers are dialect-quoted.
  • Hook payloads are built by structured token substitution — no string injection, no code execution.
  • Syncle runs locally with no auth layer. Add authentication, and restrict which destinations (database connections / endpoint URLs) a bridge may write to, before exposing it to an untrusted network.

sentences.zh: 将所有（或选定的）行流式传输一次，然后完成。

sentences.en: Perfect for the initial backfill or a migration.
sentences.zh: 非常适合初始回填或迁移。

blocks.html_en: • Watch — poll the source on a cursor (an auto-increment id, an updated_at column, or a primary-key diff) and sync new rows as they show up. Works on every engine.

sentences.en: Watch — poll the source on a cursor (an auto-increment id, an updated_at column, or a primary-key diff) and sync new rows as they show up.
sentences.zh: 监视 — 轮询游标上的源（自动增量 id、updated_at 列或主键差异）并在新行出现时同步它们。

sentences.en: Works on every engine.
sentences.zh: 适用于所有发动机。

blocks.html_en: • CDC — true change-data-capture straight from the database's change log, in real time, no polling. Postgres logical replication, MySQL binlog, MongoDB change streams, Redis keyspace notifications. Inserts, updates, and deletes all come through, each tagged with its operation.

sentences.en: CDC — true change-data-capture straight from the database's change log, in real time, no polling.
sentences.zh: CDC — 直接从数据库的更改日志中实时捕获真正的更改数据，无需轮询。

sentences.en: Postgres logical replication, MySQL binlog, MongoDB change streams, Redis keyspace notifications.
sentences.zh: Postgres 逻辑复制、MySQL binlog、MongoDB 更改流、Redis 键空间通知。

sentences.en: Inserts, updates, and deletes all come through, each tagged with its operation.
sentences.zh: 插入、更新和删除全部完成，每个操作都标记有其操作。

blocks.html_en: The rest is the same whichever destination and trigger you pick:

sentences.en: The rest is the same whichever destination and trigger you pick:
sentences.zh: 无论您选择哪个目的地和触发方式，其余部分都是相同的：

blocks.html_en: • Build it visually. Browse the source table, toggle the columns to send, pick destinations, and watch a live preview of exactly what will be written.

sentences.en: Build it visually.
sentences.zh: 直观地构建它。

sentences.en: Browse the source table, toggle the columns to send, pick destinations, and watch a live preview of exactly what will be written.
sentences.zh: 浏览源表，切换要发送的列，选择目的地，并观看将要写入的内容的实时预览。

blocks.html_en: • Map or shape the data. For a database target, map source → target columns (rename, drop, pick keys). For an HTTP target, use a safe token template — {{column}}, {{$row}}, {{$table}}, {{$op}}, {{$now}}, {{$index}}. Structured substitution only — no string injection, no code execution.

sentences.en: Map or shape the data.
sentences.zh: 映射或塑造数据。

sentences.en: For a database target, map source → target columns (rename, drop, pick keys).
sentences.zh: 对于数据库目标，映射源 → 目标列（重命名、删除、选取键）。

sentences.en: For an HTTP target, use a safe token template — {{column}}, {{$row}}, {{$table}}, {{$op}}, {{$now}}, {{$index}}.
sentences.zh: 对于 HTTP 目标，请使用安全令牌模板 — {{column}}、{{$row}}、{{$table}}、{{$op}}、{{$now}}、{{$index}}。

sentences.en: Structured substitution only — no string injection, no code execution.
sentences.zh: 仅结构化替换——无字符串注入，无代码执行。

blocks.html_en: • Sync reliably. Retries with backoff, rate limiting, optional batching, and exactly-once delivery so a change is applied once and only once downstream.

sentences.en: Sync reliably.
sentences.zh: 可靠地同步。

sentences.en: Retries with backoff, rate limiting, optional batching, and exactly-once delivery so a change is applied once and only once downstream.
sentences.zh: 使用回退、速率限制、可选批处理和一次性交付进行重试，以便下游应用一次且仅一次更改。

blocks.html_en: • Watch it happen. A live timeline colours every delivery green (synced) · red (failed) · amber (skipped) · slate (queued). Click any cell for the exact row written, the result, timing, and any error.

sentences.en: Watch it happen.
sentences.zh: 看着它发生。

sentences.en: A live timeline colours every delivery green (synced) · red (failed) · amber (skipped) · slate (queued).
sentences.zh: 实时时间线将每个交付标记为绿色（已同步）、红色（失败）、琥珀色（已跳过）、石板色（已排队）。

sentences.en: Click any cell for the exact row written, the result, timing, and any error.
sentences.zh: 单击任意单元格可查看写入的确切行、结果、时间和任何错误。

blocks.html_en: • Stay in control. Runs survive restarts, resume where they stopped, and can be cancelled. Skip rows by range or selection, or retry only the failed ones in place — failed cells flip green.

sentences.en: Stay in control.
sentences.zh: 保持控制。

sentences.en: Runs survive restarts, resume where they stopped, and can be cancelled.
sentences.zh: 运行在重新启动后仍然有效，从停止的地方恢复，并且可以取消。

sentences.en: Skip rows by range or selection, or retry only the failed ones in place — failed cells flip green.
sentences.zh: 按范围或选择跳过行，或仅重试失败的行 - 失败的单元格会变成绿色。

sentences.en: Get started
sentences.zh: 开始使用

blocks.html_en: You'll need Node 22+, pnpm 10+, and Docker. The repo pins both via .nvmrc and packageManager, so the easiest setup is:

sentences.en: You'll need Node 22+, pnpm 10+, and Docker.
sentences.zh: 您需要 Node 22+、pnpm 10+ 和 Docker。

sentences.en: The repo pins both via .nvmrc and packageManager, so the easiest setup is:
sentences.zh: 存储库通过 .nvmrc 和 packageManager 固定，因此最简单的设置是：

blocks.html_en: pnpm start does the boring parts for you: it writes the local env files, builds the workspace, runs the database migrations, then launches both the API and the web app.

sentences.en: pnpm start does the boring parts for you: it writes the local env files, builds the workspace, runs the database migrations, then launches both the API and the web app.
sentences.zh: pnpm start 为您完成无聊的部分：它编写本地环境文件、构建工作区、运行数据库迁移，然后启动 API 和 Web 应用程序。

blocks.html_en: Working on the code? pnpm dev is the same thing in watch mode.

sentences.en: Working on the code?
sentences.zh: 正在编写代码吗？

sentences.en: pnpm dev is the same thing in watch mode.
sentences.zh: pnpm dev 在监视模式下也是一样的。

blocks.html_en: Install trouble? better-sqlite3 is the only dependency that needs a native binary. On Node 22+ it installs a prebuilt one — no compiler needed. If you see it fall back to node-gyp (or a tsc: command not found right after, which just means the install bailed early), you're usually on a Node version without a prebuild or a distro-packaged pnpm with a broken node-gyp. Fix: use Node 22+ (nvm use), get pnpm via corepack enable instead of your system package manager, then pnpm install again.

sentences.en: Install trouble?
sentences.zh: 安装麻烦？

sentences.en: better-sqlite3 is the only dependency that needs a native binary.
sentences.zh: better-sqlite3 是唯一需要本机二进制文件的依赖项。

sentences.en: On Node 22+ it installs a prebuilt one — no compiler needed.
sentences.zh: 在 Node 22+ 上，它会安装一个预构建的 — 不需要编译器。

sentences.en: If you see it fall back to node-gyp (or a tsc: command not found right after, which just means the install bailed early), you're usually on a Node version without a prebuild or a distro-packaged pnpm with a broken node-gyp.
sentences.zh: 如果您看到它回落到node-gyp（或之后找不到tsc：命令，这仅意味着安装提前终止），那么您通常使用的是没有预构建的Node版本或带有损坏的node-gyp的发行版打包的pnpm。

sentences.en: Fix: use Node 22+ (nvm use), get pnpm via corepack enable instead of your system package manager, then pnpm install again.
sentences.zh: 修复：使用 Node 22+（nvm 使用），通过 corepack enable 而不是系统包管理器获取 pnpm，然后再次 pnpm 安装。

sentences.zh: 修复：使用 Node 22+（nvm 使用），通过 corepack enable 而不是系统包管理器获取 pnpm，然后再次 pnpm 安装。

blocks.html_en: The two services back different things. Postgres holds Syncle's own metadata (saved connections, hooks, runs, deliveries) through Prisma. Redis backs the BullMQ queue that runs hooks durably. Connecting databases, browsing data, and building/previewing hooks all work without Redis — only running a hook needs it. Point DATABASE_URL / REDIS_URL at your own instances if you'd rather not use the bundled containers.

sentences.en: The two services back different things.
sentences.zh: 这两种服务支持不同的东西。

sentences.en: Postgres holds Syncle's own metadata (saved connections, hooks, runs, deliveries) through Prisma.
sentences.zh: Postgres 通过 Prisma 保存 Syncle 自己的元数据（保存的连接、挂钩、运行、交付）。

sentences.en: Redis backs the BullMQ queue that runs hooks durably.
sentences.zh: Redis 支持持久运行钩子的 BullMQ 队列。

sentences.en: Connecting databases, browsing data, and building/previewing hooks all work without Redis — only running a hook needs it.
sentences.zh: 连接数据库、浏览数据以及构建/预览钩子都可以在没有 Redis 的情况下完成——只有运行钩子才需要它。

sentences.en: Point DATABASE_URL / REDIS_URL at your own instances if you'd rather not use the bundled containers.
sentences.zh: 如果您不想使用捆绑的容器，请将 DATABASE_URL / REDIS_URL 指向您自己的实例。

Redis backs the BullMQ queue that runs hooks durably. Connecting databases, browsing data, and building/previewing hooks all work without Redis — only running a hook needs it. Point DATABASE_URL / REDIS_URL at your own instances if you'd rather not use the bundled containers.

sentences.en: The two services back different things.
sentences.zh: 这两种服务支持不同的东西。

sentences.en: Postgres holds Syncle's own metadata (saved connections, hooks, runs, deliveries) through Prisma.
sentences.zh: Postgres 通过 Prisma 保存 Syncle 自己的元数据（保存的连接、挂钩、运行、交付）。

sentences.en: Redis backs the BullMQ queue that runs hooks durably.

sentences.en: Connecting databases, browsing data, and building/previewing hooks all work without Redis — only running a hook needs it.
sentences.zh: 连接数据库、浏览数据以及构建/预览钩子都可以在没有 Redis 的情况下完成——只有运行钩子才需要它。

sentences.zh: 如果您不想使用捆绑的容器，请将 DATABASE_URL / REDIS_URL 指向您自己的实例。

sentences.en: The bridge lifecycle
sentences.zh: 桥梁生命周期

blocks.html_en: • Connect your databases (credentials encrypted at rest) from the Data sources workbench, or inline while building a bridge.

sentences.en: Connect your databases (credentials encrypted at rest) from the Data sources workbench, or inline while building a bridge.
sentences.zh: 从数据源工作台连接您的数据库（静态加密的凭据），或在构建桥梁时内联。

blocks.html_en: • Create a bridge — pick the source table and columns, then choose where it syncs: one or more target databases (map columns or let it auto-create the table) and/or an HTTP endpoint. Pick a trigger (replay / watch / CDC). For CDC the builder runs a readiness check and tells you exactly what (if anything) the source still needs configured.

sentences.en: Create a bridge — pick the source table and columns, then choose where it syncs: one or more target databases (map columns or let it auto-create the table) and/or an HTTP endpoint.
sentences.zh: 创建桥 — 选择源表和列，然后选择同步位置：一个或多个目标数据库（映射列或让它自动创建表）和/或 HTTP 端点。

sentences.en: Pick a trigger (replay / watch / CDC).
sentences.zh: 选择一个触发器（重播/观看/CDC）。

sentences.en: For CDC the builder runs a readiness check and tells you exactly what (if anything) the source still needs configured.
sentences.zh: 对于 CDC，构建器会运行准备情况检查，并准确告诉您源仍需要配置哪些内容（如果有）。

blocks.html_en: • Run / listen — a replay job streams rows once with the timeline updating live; a watch or CDC bridge starts listening and syncs changes as they happen.

sentences.en: Run / listen — a replay job streams rows once with the timeline updating live; a watch or CDC bridge starts listening and syncs changes as they happen.
sentences.zh: 运行/监听——重放作业将行流传输一次，时间轴实时更新；手表或 CDC 桥接器开始侦听并同步发生的更改。

blocks.html_en: • React — skip rows you don't want, cancel, resume the remainder, or retry the failures after fixing a destination. Edits apply on the next run/resume.

sentences.en: React — skip rows you don't want, cancel, resume the remainder, or retry the failures after fixing a destination.
sentences.zh: React — 跳过您不需要的行、取消、恢复其余行，或在修复目标后重试失败。

sentences.en: Edits apply on the next run/resume.
sentences.zh: 编辑将应用于下一次运行/恢复。

blocks.html_en: Source data, when you need it

sentences.en: Source data, when you need it
sentences.zh: 源数据，当您需要时

blocks.html_en: Syncle ships a full database workbench (the "Data sources" surface) — handy for shaping a source and for inspecting what landed in a destination:

sentences.en: Syncle ships a full database workbench (the "Data sources" surface) — handy for shaping a source and for inspecting what landed in a destination:
sentences.zh: Syncle 提供了一个完整的数据库工作台（“数据源”表面）——可以方便地塑造源并检查目标中的内容：

blocks.html_en: • Browse any table — paginated, sortable, multi-condition filters, inline edit, insert/delete, CSV/JSON export.

sentences.en: Browse any table — paginated, sortable, multi-condition filters, inline edit, insert/delete, CSV/JSON export.
sentences.zh: 浏览任何表格 — 分页、可排序、多条件过滤器、内联编辑、插入/删除、CSV/JSON 导出。

blocks.html_en: • A Monaco query editor with tabs, autocomplete, and formatting.

sentences.en: A Monaco query editor with tabs, autocomplete, and formatting.
sentences.zh: 具有选项卡、自动完成和格式设置功能的摩纳哥查询编辑器。

blocks.html_en: • Schema explorer, structure view, interactive ER diagram, and full DDL (create/drop/truncate tables, create/drop databases).

sentences.en: Schema explorer, structure view, interactive ER diagram, and full DDL (create/drop/truncate tables, create/drop databases).
sentences.zh: 模式浏览器、结构视图、交互式 ER 图和完整的 DDL（创建/删除/截断表、创建/删除数据库）。

blocks.html_en: • Backup & restore — portable JSON for any engine, or .sql for relational ones.

sentences.en: Backup & restore — portable JSON for any engine, or .sql for relational ones.
sentences.zh: 备份和恢复 — 适用于任何引擎的可移植 JSON，或适用于关系引擎的 .sql。

blocks.html_en: Every table view has a one-click "Create bridge" that drops you into the builder pre-seeded with that table as the source.

sentences.en: Every table view has a one-click "Create bridge" that drops you into the builder pre-seeded with that table as the source.
sentences.zh: 每个表视图都有一个一键式“创建桥”，可让您进入以该表作为源预先植入的构建器。

sentences.en: How it's built
sentences.zh: 它是如何构建的

blocks.html_en: A pnpm monorepo with a one-way dependency flow (web → api → core):

sentences.en: A pnpm monorepo with a one-way dependency flow (web → api → core):
sentences.zh: 具有单向依赖流的 pnpm monorepo（web → api → core）：

blocks.html_en: One sink, two destination kinds. Every trigger (replay, watch, CDC) funnels rows through a single sink router. It dispatches to the database sink (which maps columns, auto-creates the target if needed, and performs a native upsert or keyed delete on the target engine) or to HTTP delivery (template render + POST with retries). The runner, monitor, and exactly-once accounting don't care which — so a new destination is one module.

sentences.en: One sink, two destination kinds.
sentences.zh: 一个水槽，两种目的地。

sentences.en: Every trigger (replay, watch, CDC) funnels rows through a single sink router.
sentences.zh: 每个触发器（重放、监视、CDC）都通过单个接收器路由器汇集行。

sentences.en: It dispatches to the database sink (which maps columns, auto-creates the target if needed, and performs a native upsert or keyed delete on the target engine) or to HTTP delivery (template render + POST with retries).
sentences.zh: 它分派到数据库接收器（映射列，根据需要自动创建目标，并在目标引擎上执行本机更新插入或键控删除）或 HTTP 传递（模板渲染 + POST 并重试）。

sentences.en: The runner, monitor, and exactly-once accounting don't care which — so a new destination is one module.
sentences.zh: 运行器、监视器和一次性记账并不关心哪一个 — 因此新的目的地就是一个模块。

blocks.html_en: Exactly-once, cross-engine. Database targets write with the engine's own atomic upsert — Postgres/SQLite ON CONFLICT, MySQL ON DUPLICATE KEY, Mongo updateOne(upsert) — keyed by the columns you chose. That makes every write idempotent: replays and at-least-once CDC redeliveries land a row once. Deletes route to a keyed delete on each target.

sentences.en: Exactly-once, cross-engine.
sentences.zh: 恰好一次，跨引擎。

sentences.en: Database targets write with the engine's own atomic upsert — Postgres/SQLite ON CONFLICT, MySQL ON DUPLICATE KEY, Mongo updateOne(upsert) — keyed by the columns you chose.
sentences.zh: 数据库目标使用引擎自己的原子 upsert 进行写入 - Postgres/SQLite ON CONFLICT、MySQL ON DUPLICATE KEY、Mongo updateOne(upsert) - 由您选择的列作为键控。

sentences.en: That makes every write idempotent: replays and at-least-once CDC redeliveries land a row once.
sentences.zh: 这使得每次写入都是幂等的：重播和至少一次 CDC 重新传递会连续发生一次。

sentences.en: Deletes route to a keyed delete on each target.
sentences.zh: 删除每个目标上的键控删除的路由。

blocks.html_en: Durable runs. A replay run is one BullMQ job (jobId = runId). It streams the source a page at a time (keyset pagination for millions of rows), syncs sequentially (natural backpressure), and checkpoints progress — so a crash auto-resumes from where it left off.

sentences.en: Durable runs.
sentences.zh: 持久运行。

sentences.en: A replay run is one BullMQ job (jobId = runId).
sentences.zh: 重播运行是一个 BullMQ 作业 (jobId = runId)。

sentences.en: It streams the source a page at a time (keyset pagination for millions of rows), syncs sequentially (natural backpressure), and checkpoints progress — so a crash auto-resumes from where it left off.
sentences.zh: 它一次流式传输一个页面的源（数百万行的键集分页），顺序同步（自然背压），并检查点进度 - 因此崩溃会自动从停止的地方恢复。

blocks.html_en: CDC behind one interface. Each engine captures changes its own way, but they all implement the same small CdcProvider contract (readiness, provision, stream, cursor). The service around them handles the run lifecycle and the shared dedupe → map → write → record → checkpoint pipeline, so adding a new engine's CDC is a single file.

sentences.en: CDC behind one interface.
sentences.zh: CDC 在一个接口后面。

sentences.en: Each engine captures changes its own way, but they all implement the same small CdcProvider contract (readiness, provision, stream, cursor).
sentences.zh: 每个引擎以自己的方式捕获更改，但它们都实现相同的小型 CdcProvider 合约（就绪、提供、流、游标）。

sentences.en: The service around them handles the run lifecycle and the shared dedupe → map → write → record → checkpoint pipeline, so adding a new engine's CDC is a single file.
sentences.zh: 它们周围的服务处理运行生命周期和共享的重复数据删除 → 映射 → 写入 → 记录 → 检查点管道，因此添加新引擎的 CDC 是一个文件。

blocks.html_en: Two data layers, two right tools. The databases you connect to have unknown, runtime-discovered schemas, so the adapters use raw drivers with fully parameterized queries (an ORM can't introspect arbitrary schemas). Syncle's own store has a fixed schema we control, so it uses Prisma with migrations.

sentences.en: Two data layers, two right tools.
sentences.zh: 两个数据层，两个合适的工具。

sentences.en: The databases you connect to have unknown, runtime-discovered schemas, so the adapters use raw drivers with fully parameterized queries (an ORM can't introspect arbitrary schemas).
sentences.zh: 您连接的数据库具有未知的、运行时发现的架构，因此适配器使用带有完全参数化查询的原始驱动程序（ORM 无法内省任意架构）。

sentences.en: Syncle's own store has a fixed schema we control, so it uses Prisma with migrations.
sentences.zh: Syncle 自己的商店有我们控制的固定架构，因此它使用 Prisma 进行迁移。

blocks.html_en: Adding an engine = implement DatabaseAdapter and register it. The connection form, schema browser, and feature gating all derive from that one registration.

sentences.en: Adding an engine = implement DatabaseAdapter and register it.
sentences.zh: 添加引擎 = 实现 DatabaseAdapter 并注册它。

sentences.en: The connection form, schema browser, and feature gating all derive from that one registration.
sentences.zh: 连接表单、架构浏览器和功能门控均源自该注册。

blocks.html_en: Adding an engine = implement DatabaseAdapter and register it. The connection form, schema browser, and feature gating all derive from that one registration.

sentences.en: Adding an engine = implement DatabaseAdapter and register it.
sentences.zh: 添加引擎 = 实现 DatabaseAdapter 并注册它。

sentences.en: The connection form, schema browser, and feature gating all derive from that one registration.
sentences.zh: 连接表单、架构浏览器和功能门控均源自该注册。

sentences.en: Configuration
sentences.zh: 配置

blocks.html_en: Env files are created automatically on first run from the committed *.env.example files. The essentials:

sentences.en: Env files are created automatically on first run from the committed *.env.example files.
sentences.zh: 首次运行时会从提交的 *.env.example 文件自动创建环境文件。

sentences.en: The essentials:
sentences.zh: 要点：

sentences.en: Variable
sentences.zh: 多变的

sentences.en: Purpose

content_html_zh:
保持所有数据库实时、跨引擎同步。

连接您的数据库，在源和一个或多个目标之间架起一座桥梁，Syncle 使它们保持同步：当源中的一行发生更改时，它就会写入您链接的每个目标。 任何引擎到任何引擎 - PostgreSQL · MySQL/MariaDB · SQLite · MongoDB · Redis - 以及需要时的 HTTP 端点。

桥就是：源→一个或多个目的地→保持同步。

它的作用

桥从源数据库读取行并将每一行写入其目的地。 目的地是：

  • 另一个数据库——头条新闻。 同步 Postgres → MongoDB、MySQL → SQLite、MongoDB → Redis... 自由混合引擎。 一个网桥可以同时扇出到多个数据库，并且网桥可以链接（DB A → DB B → DB C）。
  • HTTP 端点 — 当您提供服务而不是数据库时，使用您设计的有效负载将每一行 POST/PUT/PATCH 到 URL。

是什么让数据库到数据库的同步值得信赖：

  • 任何引擎→任何引擎。 同一个桥在关系存储、文档存储和键值存储之间移动一行。 值被转换以适合目标。
  • 永远没有重复。 写入是由您选择的列作为键控的幂等更新插入，因此重播、重试和重新传递永远不会重复写入。 插入、更新和删除都会传播。
  • 缺少桌子？ 自动创建它。 如果目标表/集合不存在，Syncle 会根据源的形状创建它（使用跨引擎类型转换）。 或者自己映射和重命名列 - “将此列写入那边的那列。”
  • 实时、轮询或一次性 — 您可以选择它的触发方式（请参阅下面的触发器）。

桥梁是如何着火的

  • 重播——一次性工作。 将所有（或选定的）行流式传输一次，然后完成。 非常适合初始回填或迁移。
  • 监视 — 轮询游标上的源（自动增量 id、updated_at 列或主键差异）并在新行出现时同步它们。 适用于所有发动机。
  • CDC — 直接从数据库的更改日志中实时捕获真正的更改数据，无需轮询。 Postgres 逻辑复制、MySQL binlog、MongoDB 更改流、Redis 键空间通知。 插入、更新和删除全部完成，每个操作都标记有其操作。

无论您选择哪个目的地和触发方式，其余部分都是相同的：

  • 直观地构建它。 浏览源表，切换要发送的列，选择目的地，并观看将要写入的内容的实时预览。
  • 映射或塑造数据。 对于数据库目标，映射源 → 目标列（重命名、删除、选取键）。 对于 HTTP 目标，请使用安全令牌模板 — {{column}}、{{$row}}、{{$table}}、{{$op}}、{{$now}}、{{$index}}。 仅结构化替换——无字符串注入，无代码执行。
  • 可靠地同步。 使用回退、速率限制、可选批处理和一次性交付进行重试，以便下游应用一次且仅一次更改。
  • 看着它发生。 实时时间线将每个交付标记为绿色（已同步）、红色（失败）、琥珀色（已跳过）、石板色（已排队）。 单击任意单元格可查看写入的确切行、结果、时间和任何错误。
  • 保持控制。 运行在重新启动后仍然有效，从停止的地方恢复，并且可以取消。 按范围或选择跳过行，或仅重试失败的行 - 失败的单元格会变成绿色。

开始使用

您需要 Node 22+、pnpm 10+ 和 Docker。 存储库通过 .nvmrc 和 packageManager 固定，因此最简单的设置是：

nvm use            # picks up Node 22 from .nvmrc (or just use Node 22+ yourself)
corepack enable    # gives you the exact pnpm version the repo expects

Then:

pnpm install                  # frontend + backend
docker compose up -d          # postgres (metadata) + redis (job queue)
pnpm start                    # initialize and run the whole app

pnpm start 为您完成无聊的部分：它编写本地环境文件、构建工作区、运行数据库迁移，然后启动 API 和 Web 应用程序。

  Syncle · ready

    Web  http://localhost:3002   ← open this
    API  http://localhost:4002/api

正在编写代码吗？ pnpm dev 在监视模式下也是一样的。

安装麻烦？ better-sqlite3 是唯一需要本机二进制文件的依赖项。 在 Node 22+ 上，它会安装一个预构建的 — 不需要编译器。 如果您看到它回落到node-gyp（或之后找不到tsc：命令，这仅意味着安装提前终止），那么您通常使用的是没有预构建的Node版本或带有损坏的node-gyp的发行版打包的pnpm。 修复：使用 Node 22+（nvm 使用），通过 corepack enable 而不是系统包管理器获取 pnpm，然后再次 pnpm 安装。
这两种服务支持不同的东西。 Postgres 通过 Prisma 保存 Syncle 自己的元数据（保存的连接、挂钩、运行、交付）。 Redis 支持持久运行钩子的 BullMQ 队列。 连接数据库、浏览数据以及构建/预览钩子都可以在没有 Redis 的情况下完成——只有运行钩子才需要它。 如果您不想使用捆绑的容器，请将 DATABASE_URL / REDIS_URL 指向您自己的实例。

桥梁生命周期

  1. 从数据源工作台连接您的数据库（静态加密的凭据），或在构建桥梁时内联。
  2. 创建桥 — 选择源表和列，然后选择同步位置：一个或多个目标数据库（映射列或让它自动创建表）和/或 HTTP 端点。 选择一个触发器（重播/观看/CDC）。 对于 CDC，构建器会运行准备情况检查，并准确告诉您源仍需要配置哪些内容（如果有）。
  3. 运行/监听——重放作业将行流传输一次，时间轴实时更新；手表或 CDC 桥接器开始侦听并同步发生的更改。
  4. React — 跳过您不需要的行、取消、恢复其余行，或在修复目标后重试失败。 编辑将应用于下一次运行/恢复。

源数据，当您需要时

Syncle 提供了一个完整的数据库工作台（“数据源”表面）——可以方便地塑造源并检查目标中的内容：

  • 浏览任何表格 — 分页、可排序、多条件过滤器、内联编辑、插入/删除、CSV/JSON 导出。
  • 具有选项卡、自动完成和格式设置功能的摩纳哥查询编辑器。
  • 模式浏览器、结构视图、交互式 ER 图和完整的 DDL（创建/删除/截断表、创建/删除数据库）。
  • 备份和恢复 — 适用于任何引擎的可移植 JSON，或适用于关系引擎的 .sql。

每个表视图都有一个一键式“创建桥”，可让您进入以该表作为源预先植入的构建器。

它是如何构建的

具有单向依赖流的 pnpm monorepo（web → api → core）：

syncle/
├─ packages/
│  └─ core/            @syncle/core — framework-agnostic domain (pure TS)
│     ├─ adapters/       DatabaseAdapter interface + one file per engine
│     │                  (raw drivers: pg, mysql2, better-sqlite3, mongodb, ioredis)
│     └─ hooks/          column mapping + cross-engine table translation,
│                        payload transform, shared bridge schemas (Zod)
├─ apps/
│  ├─ api/             @syncle/api — NestJS backend
│  │  ├─ hooks/          bridge store · run processor · CDC providers ·
│  │  │                  sink router → database sink + HTTP delivery
│  │  ├─ connections/    Prisma-backed store · live adapter pool · controllers
│  │  ├─ common/         crypto · Zod validation · exception filter
│  │  └─ prisma/         metadata-store schema + migrations
│  └─ web/             @syncle/web — Next.js 15 frontend (shadcn/ui, TanStack)
└─ docker-compose.yml  Postgres (metadata) + Redis (run queue)

一个水槽，两种目的地。 每个触发器（重放、监视、CDC）都通过单个接收器路由器汇集行。 它分派到数据库接收器（映射列，根据需要自动创建目标，并在目标引擎上执行本机更新插入或键控删除）或 HTTP 传递（模板渲染 + POST 并重试）。 运行器、监视器和一次性记账并不关心哪一个 — 因此新的目的地就是一个模块。

恰好一次，跨引擎。 数据库目标使用引擎自己的原子 upsert 进行写入 - Postgres/SQLite ON CONFLICT、MySQL ON DUPLICATE KEY、Mongo updateOne(upsert) - 由您选择的列作为键控。 这使得每次写入都是幂等的：重播和至少一次 CDC 重新传递会连续发生一次。 删除每个目标上的键控删除的路由。

持久运行。 重播运行是一个 BullMQ 作业 (jobId = runId)。 它一次流式传输一个页面的源（数百万行的键集分页），顺序同步（自然背压），并检查点进度 - 因此崩溃会自动从停止的地方恢复。

CDC 在一个接口后面。 每个引擎以自己的方式捕获更改，但它们都实现相同的小型 CdcProvider 合约（就绪、提供、流、游标）。 它们周围的服务处理运行生命周期和共享的重复数据删除 → 映射 → 写入 → 记录 → 检查点管道，因此添加新引擎的 CDC 是一个文件。

两个数据层，两个合适的工具。 您连接的数据库具有未知的、运行时发现的架构，因此适配器使用带有完全参数化查询的原始驱动程序（ORM 无法内省任意架构）。 Syncle 自己的商店有我们控制的固定架构，因此它使用 Prisma 进行迁移。

添加引擎 = 实现 DatabaseAdapter 并注册它。 连接表单、架构浏览器和功能门控均源自该注册。

配置

首次运行时会从提交的 *.env.example 文件自动创建环境文件。 要点：

多变的 Where 目的
PORT api API端口（默认4002）
WEB_PORT web Web端口（默认3002）
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL web API 的基本 URL
DATABASE_URL api 用于元数据存储的 Postgres 数据源
REDIS_URL api Redis 支持桥接运行队列
SYNCLE_MASTER_KEY api 用于秘密加密的 base64 32 字节密钥
SYNCLE_HOOK_CONCURRENCY api 可以并行执行多少个桥接运行
WEB_ORIGIN api CORS 来源（默认为 dev 中的任何来源）

如果未设置 SYNCLE_MASTER_KEY，则首次运行时会在 apps/api/.syncle/ 下生成随机密钥 - 在生产中显式设置它。

疾病预防控制中心先决条件

重播和观看桥接器可以在任何地方使用。 CDC 需要配置用于更改捕获的源数据库；建筑商的准备小组会为您检查所有这些并指出缺少的内容。

引擎 机制 它需要什么
PostgreSQL 逻辑复制 wal_level=逻辑，具有 REPLICATION 的角色（自动创建的槽/发布）
MySQL 二进制日志 log_bin=ON、binlog_format=ROW、binlog_row_image=FULL、复制授权
MongoDB 改变流 一个副本集（单节点副本集适合开发）；原像自动启用，因此删除可以通过您的密钥传播
Redis 键空间通知 notification-keyspace-events（Syncle 在可以的情况下启用它）
SQLite — 不支持；使用表钩代替
Redis CDC 仅是实时的且非持久性的——Syncle 离线时发生的事件无法恢复，因此如果需要保证，最好使用监视钩子。

技术栈

NestJS · BullMQ + Redis · Prisma + PostgreSQL · Next.js 15 · React 19 · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · shadcn/ui · TanStack 查询和表 · Monaco · React Flow · Zod · Vitest。

安全

  • 连接密码和挂钩身份验证密钥在静态时进行加密 (AES-256-GCM)，并且仅返回到经过编辑的浏览器。
  • 所有用户值都作为绑定参数传递；标识符是方言引用的。
  • 挂钩有效负载是通过结构化令牌替换构建的 - 没有字符串注入，没有代码执行。
  • Syncle 在本地运行，没有身份验证层。 在将网桥暴露给不受信任的网络之前，添加身份验证并限制网桥可以写入的目标（数据库连接/端点 URL）。
